handle.min: Handle must be at least 3 characters.
handle.max: Handle must be at most 30 characters.
handle.regex: Handle must only contain letters, numbers, and underscores.
handle.startsOrEndsWith: Handle cannot start or end with an underscore.
handle.conflict: This handle is already in use.

error.errorIdHelper: Please include the error ID when contacting support for better error tracking.

UNLISTED.title: Quite Public
UNLISTED.description: Everyone can see this, but it's not searchable.

DIRECT.title: Mentioned
DIRECT.description: Only the mentioned accounts can see this.

home.title: Home timeline
home.description: This is the default feed where followed accounts and recommended posts can be browsed together.

search.title: Search
search.description: This is the discovery screen for trends, keywords, and people. It is a good place to add search input and recommended topics.

compose.title: Compose
compose.description: This entry screen can connect the writing flow for new posts, media attachments, and reply target selection.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: This is where mentions, likes, reposts, and follow events can be collected into a notification feed.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: This user page is ready for a profile header, post list, likes, and media tabs.
